Marriage made us partners; the work made us a team. Since then we've stood at the back of countless ceremonies, knelt in golden fields, and chased the last warm light of the day side by side. We shoot as one, which is why you'll always hear us say \"we\" — there are two of us reading the room, two of us anticipating the glance, the laugh, the quiet hand-squeeze you didn't know we saw."}],["$","p","1",{"children":"Our family is the heart of all of it. We're raising three kids — Ethan, Lizzie, and Enzo — and they're the reason we believe so deeply in slowing down for the people and moments that matter. Faith roots us and gratitude steadies us, and both shape the way we show up: present, unhurried, and genuinely glad to be there. 23:["$","p","2",{"children":"Recently we packed up a life well-loved in Northeast Florida and planted roots in Austin, Texas. Now the Hill Country is our backyard — those open fields, big skies, and gentle evening sun-flare that make our kind of warm, natural-light work feel like home. We photograph weddings, couples and engagements, families, high school seniors, lifestyle and branding portraits, and the events worth remembering — here in Austin and wherever the road (or the light) calls us."}]
